title: noccaea montana
intro: Noccaea montana, also known as rock cabbage or mountain penny cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. Noccaea montana is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a range of health issues.
